title: Halal-friendly engagement cakes for Rosehill and Camellia families
summary:
Engaged couples in Rosehill and Camellia keep asking the same question: does a halal-friendly cake mean a special request. At Harris Park, the answer has been no since 2019 — every cake is 100% eggless, every time, which is why there's no cross-contamination question to raise in the first place. Halal-friendly by default, not by request.

Six sizes, 15 flavours including Rasmalai and Ferrero Rocher, finished in buttercream, fondant, or ganache. Photo references accepted for any engagement or wedding design.

48 hours minimum notice. That's what fresh baking actually takes. Pickup from Wigram Street, a short drive from Rosehill and Camellia.

Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725. We speak Hindi and Gujarati too.
